mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Meredith, November 28, 1861
mdRecord.dcterms:description: First Lieutenant James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Meredith from Fort Hatteras, North Carolina, discussing a reading of the Bible, matters of pay, status of the black population near Fort Hatteras, potential military movements, and the quality of Gertrude's writing.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-1865
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
